command:
cd /Users/jmagady/Dev/prism/.worktrees/TD-WV1-04-tls-harness-wiring && git commit -m "$(cat <<EOF
fix(MEDIUM-001): retain axum_server::Handle in all 6 TLS clones for graceful shutdown

Store the axum_server::Handle in each clone struct after bind_rustls succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
